title: Daily NK: 평산 우라늄 정련소 위성사진 — 4/7 촬영, 용매추출동 지붕 보수·화물열차 4량 관측·신규 건설·폐기물 저수지 확대, 옐로케이크 생산 가동 확인
snippet: Satellite imagery from April 7 shows the roof of the solvent extraction and precipitation building repainted, a freight train of approximately four cars stopped on the facility's rail spur suggesting yellowcake transport to Yongbyon, new construction near coal storage area, and dark gray/black sludge deposits expanding in tailings ponds. Pyongsan is North Korea's only known facility for producing uranium yellowcake.
tag_reason: 이전 7일 소스에 평산(Pyongsan) 우라늄 정련소 관련 보도 없음. 영변(Yongbyon) 위성사진과는 별도 시설(핵연료 공급망 상류). 4월 발행으로 추정되나 구체적 날짜 불명
